_comment: Subdomain takeover detector signatures. Each entry: cname_patterns (substrings that indicate the resource type), http_status (status codes consistent with a dangling resource), body_regex (case-insensitive regex that confirms claim-availability), nx_only (true => match on NXDOMAIN with no HTTP probe needed), vulnerable (always true here; informational), claim_hint (operator-facing note).
_source: Curated from EdOverflow/can-i-take-over-xyz + Hacker0x01 disclosures. Last reviewed 2026-04-26.

detectors.body_regex: NoSuchBucket|The specified bucket does not exist
detectors.claim_hint: Register the bucket name in the same AWS region. Verify region from CNAME path.

detectors.body_regex: There isn't a GitHub Pages site here
detectors.claim_hint: Create a GitHub repo named <username>.github.io or configure Pages on a repo and add a CNAME file.
Create a Heroku app with the matching name; add the custom domain.
Create an Azure App Service with the same name. Confirm region match if the app uses a regional CNAME.
Provision an Azure Cloud Service / VM with the matching DNS name.
Create a Traffic Manager profile with the matching prefix.

detectors.body_regex: BlobNotFound|The specified blob does not exist|InvalidUri|The specifed resource name contains invalid characters
detectors.claim_hint: Create a storage account with the matching name and a blob container of the same path.

detectors.body_regex: Sorry, this shop is currently unavailable|Only one step left
detectors.claim_hint: Register a Shopify store with the same name; requires payment method on file.
Add the domain to your Fastly service configuration. Requires the original Fastly account to have lapsed.

detectors.body_regex: Whatever you were looking for doesn't currently exist at this address
detectors.claim_hint: Create a Tumblr blog and add the custom domain.

detectors.body_regex: The requested URL was not found on this server
detectors.claim_hint: Unbounce now requires SSL verification — confirm before claiming.

detectors.body_regex: The thing you were looking for is no longer here, or never was
detectors.claim_hint: Sign up for a Ghost(Pro) account and add the custom domain.

detectors.body_regex: The gods are wise, but do not know of the site which you seek
detectors.claim_hint: Create a Pantheon site and connect the domain.
Create a Bitbucket repo and enable Pages with the matching URL.
WordPress.com may require domain ownership verification — confirm manually.
Sign up for a ReadMe project with the matching subdomain.

detectors.body_regex: NoSuchBucket|The specified bucket does not exist
detectors.claim_hint: Create a GCS bucket with the matching name (subject to global GCS namespace).
Netlify uses random subdomain tokens; confirm before claiming.
Vercel deployments use ephemeral subdomains — verify ownership manually.
Provision an Azure API Management instance with the matching name.
